user.title: Monitor My Solar
user.description: Please enter the following information to set up your inverter.

data.update_interval: Update Interval (how often to save to database)

parallel.title: Multiple Inverter Configuration
parallel.description: Enter the additional dongle IDs for your parallel inverters.

error.dongle_not_responding: Dongle is not responding. Please check the ID and ensure it's online.
error.dongle_id_required: A new dongle ID is required
error.dongle_not_found: The selected dongle was not found in this configuration

abort.no_restorable_entities: There are no deleted or disabled entities to restore.

data.action: What would you like to do?

add_dongle.title: Add New Dongle
add_dongle.description: Enter the ID of the dongle you want to add

remove_dongle.title: Remove Dongle
remove_dongle.description: Select the dongle you want to remove

replace_dongle.title: Replace a Dongle
replace_dongle.description: Replace a failed or swapped dongle. All entities and their full history will be transferred from the old dongle to the new one. Current dongles: {current_dongles}

data.update_interval: Update Interval (how often to save to database)
data.enable_device_grouping: Enable Device Grouping (organise entities into sub-devices)
data.use_input_box: Use Input Box (use text input instead of slider for number entities)
data.drop_dongle_id: Drop Dongle ID from entity names (cleaner names; history is preserved)
data.use_beta_firmware: Use Beta Firmware (install beta releases instead of stable)

check_status.title: Integration Status

restore_entities.title: Restore Entities
restore_entities.description: {count} entity(ies) can be restored. These were deleted or disabled and won't come back on a normal reload. Select the ones to bring back — they'll be recreated from the catalog.
